title: Dov Gabbay
body: Dov M. Gabbay (, Hebrew: דב גבאי; born October 26, 1945) is an Israeli logician. He is Augustus De Morgan Professor Emeritus of Logic at the Group of Logic, Language and Computation, Department of Computer Science, King's College London.
categories: BLP articles lacking sources from December 2020
